scope: Define surface shape taxonomy, labels, split coverage, acceptance gates, and no-baseline boundaries
required_inputs: Existing v3_240 RBC baseline evidence; 24.0A-24.2 closeout; target non-RBC-like surface defect taxonomy
planned_outputs: Dataset/schema/coverage plan for asymmetric flat-bottom crack-like multi-pit and RBC-like comparator cases
acceptance_gate: Plan must define profile-depth labels, projected mask QA, topology labels, split stratification, and metrics before any COMSOL generation

scope: Plan decoder that predicts geometry/profile representation beyond L/W/D/wLD/wWD/wLW
planned_outputs: Architecture comparison for profile-grid decoder, component-aware heads, and geometry constraints
acceptance_gate: Must not force non-RBC defects into six-parameter RBC bottleneck

scope: Plan basis/implicit/profile-depth representation for free-form surface profiles
required_inputs: 25.1 profile label definition and coverage bins
planned_outputs: Representation audit matrix comparing six-param RBC, profile basis, implicit surface, and grid depth outputs
acceptance_gate: Must improve profile RMSE/Er-like without relying on Dice-only gains

scope: Plan forward residual or surrogate-consistency refinement for selected profile representation
required_inputs: 25.1 labels plus selected output representation and validation protocol
planned_outputs: Forward residual definition, validation-only selection policy, and failure-case audit plan
acceptance_gate: Residual must be diagnostic or validation-gated; no test selection and no baseline update by itself

scope: Write a final report without opening a new surface capability route
acceptance_gate: Does not address non-RBC-like surface defect gap
